descriptors.name: grain size
descriptors.physical_meaning: average crystallite diameter in polycrystalline material
descriptors.rationale: controls strength, ductility via Hall-Petch relation

quality.loss_reason: full distribution reduced to single average
quality.notes: mean obscures bimodal or heterogeneous structures

descriptors.name: twin boundary fraction
descriptors.physical_meaning: proportion of grain boundaries that are twins
descriptors.rationale: affects mechanical properties and recrystallization kinetics

quality.loss_reason: spatial distribution and twin type lost
quality.truncation_error: coherent vs incoherent twin distinction missing
quality.notes: aggregates multiple twin boundary character types

descriptors.name: stored energy
descriptors.physical_meaning: elastic energy from lattice defects and strain

quality.loss_reason: spatial heterogeneity and defect type lost
quality.truncation_error: local energy peaks and gradients missing
quality.notes: different defect configurations yield same total

descriptors.name: subgrain size
descriptors.physical_meaning: average cell diameter within deformed grains
descriptors.rationale: indicates recovery stage and local strain state

representation.notes: smaller than grain size, strain dependent

quality.truncation_error: subgrain shape and misorientation distribution missing

descriptors.name: kernel average misorientation
descriptors.physical_meaning: local orientation spread indicating deformation heterogeneity
descriptors.rationale: quantifies plastic strain and recrystallization susceptibility

quality.loss_reason: spatial field reduced to single value
quality.truncation_error: local gradients and clustering patterns lost
quality.notes: global average masks localized deformation bands

descriptors.name: grain boundary character distribution
descriptors.physical_meaning: frequency of coincidence site lattice boundary types
descriptors.rationale: controls boundary mobility, energy, and properties

representation.notes: Σ3 to Σ29 plus random boundary

quality.loss_reason: boundary plane orientation and connectivity lost
quality.truncation_error: spatial arrangement and triple junction types missing

descriptors.name: texture intensity
descriptors.physical_meaning: degree of preferred crystallographic orientation alignment
descriptors.rationale: affects anisotropy in mechanical and physical properties

representation.notes: ODF maximum or J-index typical measures

quality.truncation_error: texture components and symmetry information lost
quality.notes: different texture types yield identical intensity

descriptors.name: dislocation density
descriptors.physical_meaning: total dislocation line length per unit volume
descriptors.rationale: controls yield strength and work hardening rate

quality.truncation_error: cell structure and geometrically necessary fraction missing
quality.notes: identical density from different microstructural states

descriptors.name: grain aspect ratio
descriptors.physical_meaning: ratio of maximum to minimum grain dimension
descriptors.rationale: indicates processing history and mechanical anisotropy

representation.notes: unity for equiaxed, larger for elongated

quality.loss_reason: grain shape distribution and orientation lost
quality.truncation_error: alignment direction and shape variance missing

descriptors.name: grain boundary energy
descriptors.physical_meaning: excess free energy per unit boundary area
descriptors.rationale: drives grain growth and boundary migration

quality.truncation_error: misorientation and plane dependence averaging missing

descriptors.name: recrystallized fraction
descriptors.physical_meaning: volume fraction transformed to strain-free grains

quality.loss_reason: spatial distribution and grain size lost
quality.truncation_error: nucleation sites and growth front topology missing

descriptors.name: Schmid factor
descriptors.physical_meaning: resolved shear stress ratio for slip activation
descriptors.rationale: predicts slip system activity under loading

quality.loss_reason: grain orientation and slip system lost
quality.truncation_error: multiple slip systems and texture averaging
quality.notes: different orientations yield identical averaged value

descriptors.name: grain boundary mobility
descriptors.physical_meaning: boundary velocity per unit driving force
descriptors.rationale: controls recrystallization and grain growth kinetics

quality.loss_reason: boundary character and solute drag lost
quality.truncation_error: misorientation and impurity dependence averaging missing
quality.notes: single value masks boundary type distribution
